close_reason: Added integration tests with testdata fixtures - see commit 8213043
description:
Add integration tests that verify godeps-gen works with real-world Go modules.

**Test scenarios:**

1. **Simple module (1-2 deps):**
   - Use turnkey's own go.mod as test case
   - Verify correct output format

2. **Complex module (many deps):**
   - Test with a module like spf13/cobra or kubernetes client
   - Verify transitive deps are captured
   - Verify sorting is consistent

3. **Various import paths:**
   - github.com/* (standard)
   - golang.org/x/* (Go team modules)
   - gopkg.in/* (versioned imports)
   - go.uber.org/* (custom domains)

4. **Prefetch integration:**
   - Mock prefetcher for fast tests
   - Optional slow tests with real prefetching (CI only)

**Test fixtures:**
```
testdata/
├── simple/
│   ├── go.mod
│   ├── go.sum
│   └── expected.toml
├── complex/
│   ├── go.mod
│   ├── go.sum
│   └── expected.toml
└── edge-cases/
    ├── go.mod
    ├── go.sum
    └── expected.toml
```

**Golden file testing:**
```go
func TestIntegration_SimpleModule(t *testing.T) {
    deps, _ := ParseGoMod(readFile("testdata/simple/go.mod"), true)
    // ... merge hashes from go.sum ...
    
    var buf bytes.Buffer
    FormatTOML(deps, &buf)
    
    golden := readFile("testdata/simple/expected.toml")
    if diff := cmp.Diff(golden, buf.String()); diff != "" {
        t.Errorf("output mismatch (-want +got):\n%s", diff)
    }
}
```

Depends on: turnkey-0ej (unit tests first)
title: Integration tests for godeps-gen with real modules
